pi_items.source: Task description (line 17) and task.json - user-specified widget title per instructions
Web search of Magento 2 documentation and GitHub repositories confirm this is the correct class name for the Catalog Products List widget type
Web search confirms Magento 2 has a default theme named 'Luma'. Setup script (setup_magento.sh line 772) confirms 'Luma theme with responsive storefront' is deployed
Web search of Magento 2 documentation confirms 'cms_index_index' is the correct layout handle for the CMS Home Page (CMS Index Controller Index action)
Web search of Magento 2 layout documentation confirms 'content' is the standard container name for 'Main Content Area' in default.xml
Task description step 5 explicitly specifies 'Number of Products to Display: 5'
Task description and setup_magento.sh (line 259) which creates 'Electronics' category via REST API. setup_task.sh (line 19-23) queries database to verify Electronics category exists

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Magento 2 widget named 'Homepage Featured Electronics' using the Catalog Products List widget type (Magento\CatalogWidget\Block\Product\ProductsList). The widget displays 5 products filtered by the Electronics category on the CMS Home Page (cms_index_index layout handle) in the Main Content Area (content container) using the Magento Luma theme. All configuration values are verified against Magento 2 documentation and setup scripts. The Environment uses synthetic data (sample products and categories created via REST API during setup).
